title: 2026 CMU Commencement Keynote Speaker: Jensen Huang
description:
https://www.cmu.edu/news/stories/archives/2026/may/nvidia-founder-ceo-jensen-huang-to-carnegie-mellon-university-graduates-shape-what-comes-next
Founder and CEO of NVIDIA Jensen Huang received an honorary Doctor of Science and Technology degree and delivered an inspiring keynote address, articulating lessons learned and offering advice to graduates entering a world of accelerating change.

"You are entering the world at an extraordinary moment. A new industry is being born. A new era of science
